title: mentha elongata
intro: Mentha elongata, also known as Elongated Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve digestive problems, soothe headaches and colds, and reduce stress, offering a variety of health benefits to those who consume it. Herbal preparations of Mentha elongata include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be easily made at home using the fresh or dried leaves of the plant.
